positive: A stylized, maximalist arrangement of enchanted jungle flora and mystical fauna, featuring bioluminescent orchids, swirling vine silhouettes, and graceful celestial hummingbirds. The style should be intricate, highly detailed botanical illustration mixed with Art Nouveau elegance, rendered with deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted against solid black negative space. The composition must be centered and highly balanced, creating a strong, readable pattern suitable for repeating apparel prints. Use clean linework, bold silhouettes, and dramatic, atmospheric internal lighting, like glowing stained glass. Vector art style, engraving quality, intricate pattern design, high contrast.
negative: blurry, deformed, low contrast, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, blurry edges, extra limbs, mutated anatomy, messy, amateur drawing, realistic photography, photorealism
